use_cases: Saving/bookmarking articles or content in web applications
Marking items as favorites in e-commerce or media platforms
Adding items to reading lists or wishlists
Toggling saved state with animated feedback in productivity apps
Collection management UI for SaaS dashboards
ai_summary: A bookmark icon button component with animated save state toggle functionality. Features particle burst effects and spring animations when toggling between saved and unsaved states, providing satisfying micro-interactions. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations, lucide-react for icons, and includes accessibility support via aria-pressed attribute for screen readers.
